title: Artemis II Prepares to Take Humans Back to the Moon
author: César Centurión
excerpt: After more than 50 years, NASA has officially taken another big step for space exploration, sending humans back to the Moon’s orbit. The Artemis II mission is destined to help future missions by providing...
body:
After more than 50 years, NASA has officially taken

another big step for space exploration, sending humans

back to the Moon’s orbit. The Artemis II mission is

destined to help future missions by providing crucial

information about the Moon, astronaut health, and

spacecraft performance. And that is exactly what it did.

The mission successfully sent four astronauts around the Moon in the Orion spacecraft, launched by the powerful Space Launch System. During the journey, the crew spent about ten days in space, testing systems needed for long-distance travel. They traveled farther from Earth than any humans have in decades, marking a historic achievement. This mission did not land on the Moon, but it played an essential role in preparing for future landings.

The crew included astronauts such as Reid Wiseman and Christina Koch, along with other team members. Their mission was to observe how humans respond to deep space conditions and to ensure that all equipment works properly. According to NASA, the mission aimed to test “systems needed for deep space exploration,” highlighting its importance for future missions. Some astronauts even described the experience as “otherworldly,” showing how unique and powerful the journey was.

In addition to testing technology, Artemis II also helped scientists gather important data about space travel. This includes how the human body reacts to long periods in deep space, as well as how well communication systems work over long distances. These results will be used to improve safety and

performance in future missions. Without this type of testing, missions to the Moon or Mars would be much riskier.

Artemis II is especially important because it serves as a foundation for upcoming missions like Artemis III, which plans to land astronauts on the Moon. It also represents a step toward even more ambitious goals, such as sending humans to Mars. By completing this mission, NASA has shown that deep space exploration is once again possible and continues to advance.

In conclusion, Artemis II represents a major achievement in modern space exploration. It not only brings humans closer to returning to the Moon but also opens the door for future discoveries beyond our planet. The success of this mission proves that space exploration continues to evolve and inspire new generations.

Bibliography:

Luscombe, Richard. “Nasa’s Artemis II Rocket Lifts off for Historic Moon Mission.” The Guardian, The Guardian, Apr. 2026,

www.theguardian.com/science/2026/apr/01/nasa-rocket-moon-launch-artemis-ii?utm_source= chatgpt.com.

Shekhtman, Lonnie. “NASA’s Artemis II Lunar Science Operations to Inform Future Missions.” NASA Science, 21 Aug. 2025,

science.nasa.gov/solar-system/moon/nasas-artemis-ii-lunar-science-operations-to-inform-futu re-missions/.

title: Congreso peruano censura a José Jerí y vaca el cargo
author: Catalina Talavera
excerpt: Tab 1 En Lima, 17 de febrero de 2026 el Congreso del Perú llevó a cabo la destitución del presidente interino José Jerí luego de aprobar una censura en sesión plenaria. La decisión fue tomada con una votación...
body:
Tab 1

En Lima, 17 de febrero de 2026 el Congreso del Perú llevó a cabo la destitución del presidente interino José Jerí luego de aprobar una censura en sesión plenaria. La decisión fue tomada con una votación amplia, dejando una vacante a la Presidencia y a la vez dio paso a que se designe a un nuevo presidente interino a pocas semanas de las elecciones generales.

se aprobó con 75 votos a favor, 24 en contra y 3 abstenciones, después de que se admitieron siete mociones de censura contra Jerí y en el hemiciclo se verificó que al prosperar la censura tomada como presidente del Congreso “se encuentra vacante el cargo de presidente de la República”.

Detrás del voto había una suma de cuestionamientos que deterioraron el margen de apoyo político del mandatario interino. Entre los hechos más citados en la prensa están las reuniones no registradas con empresarios chinos (en una de las cuales incluso habría ingresado encapuchado) y denuncias sobre supuestas irregularidades en contrataciones de visitas previas a Palacio.

En medio de la citación del país ha resurgido el debate de qué cómo se puede sacar a un presidente interino cuando al mismo tiempo es presidente del Congreso. Para la BBC el Congreso optó la vía de la censura (mayoría simple) y no la vacancia presidencial, que requiere mayoría más alta y el ex presidente del Tribunal Constitucional Óscar Urviola hizo una crítica a esa vía cuando comentó que la misma era "en la práctica un golpe de Estado".

Perú tenía que designar con la mayor premura un nuevo líder a fin de evitar un vacío de poder en medio de la campaña electoral.El Congreso eligió al día siguiente al presidente interino José María Balcázar, quien ganó la presidencia del Congreso en segunda vuelta.

El presidente actual prometió ir hacia una transición “democrática" pacífica, transparente” e indicó que gobernaría hasta el 28 de julio cuando tiene que asumir el ganador de las elecciones del 12 de abril. Más allá de los nombres, la lección que deja el episodio es clara, ya que la estabilidad democrática no solo depende de las elecciones, también de la confianza ciudadana en las reglas y en la transparencia del poder.

Bibliografia:

“El presidente de Perú frente a su hora decisiva: siete mociones de censura amenazan su mandato.” El País, 17 Feb. 2026, elpais.com/america/2026-02-17/el-presidente-de-peru-frente-a-su-hora-decisiva-siete-mociones-de-censura-amenazan-su-mandato.html.

“Perú: crisis política tras destitución del presidente José Jerí.” CNN en Español, 16 Feb. 2026, cnnespanol.cnn.com/2026/02/16/latinoamerica/video/peru-crisis-presidente-jose-jeri-destitucion-conclusiones-tv.

“Pleno admite a debate las siete mociones de censura contra el presidente José Jerí.” Congreso de la República del Perú, comunicaciones.congreso.gob.pe/noticias/pleno-admite-a-debate-las-siete-mociones-de-censura-contra-el-presidente-jose-jeri/.

“Pleno admite a debate las siete mociones de censura contra el presidente José Jerí.” YouTube, uploaded by Congreso del Perú, www.youtube.com/watch?v=jeh3mc1c7Sc.

Tab 2

ongreso peruano censura a José Jerí y vaca el cargo

En Lima, el 17 de febrero de 2026, el Congreso peruano destituyó al presidente interino José Jerí tras aprobar una censura durante una sesión plenaria, esta se tomó con 75 votos a favor, 24 en contra y 3 abstenciones, lo que dejó vacante la Presidencia del país.

La censura se produjo tras varias críticas y cuestionamientos al mandatario. Entre los hechos mencionados por la prensa se encuentran reuniones no registradas con empresarios chinos y denuncias sobre posibles irregularidades en contrataciones relacionadas con visitas al Palacio de Gobierno.

Este caso también generó debate sobre el procedimiento utilizado para retirar a un presidente interino, ya que al mismo tiempo Jerí era presidente del Congreso. Algunos especialistas señalaron que usar la censura fue una decisión polémica.

Al día siguiente, el Congreso eligió a José María Balcázar como nuevo presidente interino. Él estará a cargo del país hasta el 28 de julio, cuando asumirá el ganador de las elecciones generales.

Este episodio resalta la importancia de la transparencia, la responsabilidad política y el respeto a las instituciones para mantener la estabilidad democrática del Perú.

title: El voto de confianza y la situación actual en el Perú
author: Isabela Plasencia
excerpt: Tras el cambio de gobierno, José María Balcázar asumió la presidencia interina el 18 de febrero y designó a Denisse Miralles como presidenta del consejo de ministros, convirtiéndose en primer ministro. Como...
body:
Tras el cambio de gobierno, José María Balcázar asumió la presidencia interina el 18 de febrero y designó a Denisse Miralles como presidenta del consejo de ministros, convirtiéndose en primer ministro. Como parte del proceso constitucional, el nuevo gabinete debe presentarse ante el Congreso para solicitar el voto de confianza, mediante el cual el poder legislativo aprueba o rechaza su continuidad. Este mecanismo permite a los congresistas dar o no su aprobación sobre la conformación del gabinete ministerial, siendo clave para que el poder ejecutivo pueda ejercer sus funciones con el respaldo político

Denisse Miralles, quien previamente se desempeñaba en el sector económico, fue designada como jefa del gabinete en un contexto de alta tensión política. Sin embargo, la conformación de su equipo ministerial generó cuestionamientos dentro del Congreso, lo que redujo las probabilidades de obtener el voto de confianza. Ante esta situación, se reportaron cambios y posibles salidas dentro del gabinete como estrategia para lograr mayor respaldo parlamentario

Frente a la falta de consenso y el riesgo de un rechazo por parte del congreso, el ejecutivo optó por retirar o modificar la propuesta inicial del gabinete. Actualmente, la nueva conformación ministerial ya está hecha, conformada con el nuevo ministro llamado Luis Arroyo, y se prevé que en los próximos días se presente con el objetivo de asegurar el voto de confianza.

Bibliografia:

Denisse Miralles entregó balance de su gestión como presidenta del Consejo de Ministros: By Jair Zevallos MorónContainer: Rpp.pePublisher: RPPYear: 2026URL: https://rpp.pe/politica/gobierno/denisse-miralles-entrego-balance-de-gestion-como-presidenta-del-consejo-de-ministros-noticia-1680455?ref=rpp

José María Balcázar es elegido presidente del Congreso de la República - Comunicaciones: By Container: ComunicacionesYear: 2026URL: https://comunicaciones.congreso.gob.pe/noticias/jose-maria-balcazar-es-elegido-presidente-del-congreso-de-la-republica/

Sin fecha para el voto de confianza: Gabinete Arroyo llega a semanas de las elecciones sin definir presentación: By Mariana Quilca CatacoraContainer: infobaeYear: 2026URL: https://www.infobae.com/peru/2026/03/18/sin-fecha-para-el-voto-de-confianza-gabinete-arroyo-llega-a-semanas-de-las-elecciones-sin-definir-presentacion/

title: Escalating Middle East Tensions: Iran, Israel, and the United States on the Brink of Wider Conflict
author: César Centurión
excerpt: Recently, in the Middle East, there have been major events between the rivals Iran and Israel, plus the recent participation of the US.With disagreeing governments, opposing beliefs, increasing military...
body:
Recently, in the Middle East, there have been major

events between the rivals Iran and Israel, plus the recent

participation of the US.With disagreeing governments,

opposing beliefs, increasing military action, this renewed

conflict has sparked debate on the future of this quickly

A growing clash, with many experts worrying about the other countries getting involved, which could trigger even a

Third World War.

One main reason for the conflict is Iran and Israel’s background. Iran doesn’t recognize Israel as a legitimate country and often criticizes it publicly. On the other hand, Israel sees Iran as a serious threat to its military influence across the region. For a while, these two have exchanged small attacks, including cyberattacks, airstrikes, and support for opposing groups in nearby territory.

Another major global concern is Iran’s nuclear program. While it is stated by Iran that this program’s function is only for energy and scientific research, many others, including Israel and the US, suspect that Iran could be hiding their actual intentions and developing nuclear weapons. As a result of this disagreement, the United States has placed economic sanctions on the Iranian government, resulting in high inflation of around 70% in food.

The US and Israel have been very close allies for a very long time, with the US giving up to $3.8 billion in military aid per year. According to the Council on Foreign Relations, Iran has worked with many different armed groups that have increased the tension with Israel and its allies, attacking Israeli or US targets.

Because of these tensions, many leaders worry about the possibility of a larger conflict. If fighting between these countries increases, it could affect the entire Middle East and even the global economy.

Although the situation remains tense, many countries are trying to prevent a larger war. Understanding the conflict between Iran, Israel, and the United States is important because events in this region can influence global politics and security.

Bibliography:

BBC News Africa. “How Iran and the US Went from Friends to Bitter Foes - BBC Africa.” YouTube, 28 Feb. 2026, www.youtube.com/watch?v=7CRgQTIioCQ.

Verde, Amaya, et al. “Mapping Strikes in the Israel-Iran Conflict.” The Washington Post, 18 June 2025, www.washingtonpost.com/world/2025/06/18/israel-iran-maps-strikes/.

title: Hungary Ceases Gas Aid Amid Ukraine War
author: Rodrigo Tello
excerpt: The ongoing conflict between Russia and Ukraine has taken a new turn as Viktor Orbán, Hungary’s prime minister, announced that the country will no longer supply gas to support Ukraine. The decision, revealed...
body:
The ongoing conflict between Russia and Ukraine has taken a new turn as Viktor Orbán, Hungary’s prime minister, announced that the country will no longer supply gas to support Ukraine. The decision, revealed in March 2026, raises concerns across Europe as energy remains a critical factor in the war. This shift matters because it could affect both Ukraine’s resilience and regional stability.

Hungary’s decision reflects ongoing tensions within the European Union regarding how to handle the war. While many EU countries continue supporting Ukraine, Hungary has often taken a more cautious stance due to its reliance on Russian energy. This move may weaken unity among European nations at a crucial moment.

According to political analysts, the reduction in gas support could increase pressure on Ukraine's infrastructure and economy. Analyst Rizzi warns that continuous Russian attacks on Ukraine's energy infrastructure have already eliminated roughly 55% of the country's domestic gas production, forcing Kyiv to draw from strategic storage and seek new imports, a situation that Hungary's withdrawal only worsens. As noted in Foreign Affairs, the use of energy as a weapon in this conflict is back "with a vengeance," with both sides seeing it as a strategic lever capable of influencing outcomes well beyond the battlefield. This highlights how decisions outside direct military action still play a major role in the war.

Furthermore, the announcement may strengthen Russia’s position, as energy exports remain one of its key economic tools. Since the beginning of the Russian invasion of Ukraine, control over energy resources has been central to geopolitical strategies. Hungary’s decision could therefore shift the balance of influence in subtle but significant ways.

In conclusion, Hungary’s halt in gas support signals a potential change in European involvement in the war. As the conflict continues, decisions like this demonstrate how economic and political actions can shape the future of the region. The coming months will likely reveal whether this move leads to broader changes within Europe’s response to the war.

Bibliography:

“Russia Analytical Report, Nov. 17–24, 2025 | Russia Matters.” Russiamatters.org, 2025, www.russiamatters.org/news/russia-analytical-report/russia-analytical-report-nov-17-24-2025. Accessed 28 Mar. 2026.

‌

‌

title: Indonesia Moves to Ban Social Media for Under-16s
author: Rodrigo Tello
excerpt: Indonesia is planning to ban social media access for users under the age of 16 in an effort to protect young people online. The policy, announced in 2026 by the Indonesian government, would require platforms...
body:
Indonesia is planning to ban social media access for users under the age of 16 in an effort to protect young people online. The policy, announced in 2026 by the Indonesian government, would require platforms to verify users' ages before allowing them to create accounts. Officials argue that the measure is necessary to reduce younger individuals' exposure to harmful content, cyberbullying, and online addiction. If implemented, it could affect millions of teenagers and spark a global debate about youth safety on the internet.

One of the main reasons for the proposed ban is the growing concern over the mental health effects of social media on children. According to Indonesian officials, platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube expose children to harmful material, unrealistic expectations, and excessive screen time. By limiting access until the age of 16, the government hopes to create a safer digital environment within its population. This policy aims to reduce risks such as cyberbullying and online exploitation among minors.

However, the proposal has also raised concerns about freedom and practicality. Critics argue that teenagers often rely on social media for communication, learning, and creative expression. Researchers Oonagh Wesley-Smith and Terry Fleming highlight the importance of considering young people’s perspectives when creating regulations. As they explain, “Policies must balance safeguarding with respect for youth rights and perspectives. Their lived experience is vital to crafting responses that are effective and legitimate.”

Despite the debate, Indonesia is not the only country exploring stricter online rules for minors. Governments around the world are increasingly discussing ways to regulate social media use among children and teenagers. These discussions reflect a broader concern about how technology shapes young people’s development and well-being. The Indonesian proposal could therefore influence future policies in other countries.

Indonesia’s plan to ban social media for users under 16 highlights the growing challenge of balancing digital freedom with safety online for the youth population. While the policy aims to protect young people, it also raises important questions about enforcement and personal rights. As governments continue to address the current risks of the digital age, the debate over how and when young people should access social media is likely to continue.

Bibliography:

Welsey‐Smith, Oonagh, and Terry Fleming. “Debate: Social Media in Children and Young People – Time for a Ban? From Polarised Debate to Precautionary Action – a Population Mental Health Perspective on Social Media and Youth Well‐Being.” Child and Adolescent Mental Health, vol. 30, no. 4, Wiley, Sept. 2025, pp. 416–18, https://doi.org/10.1111/camh.70033. Accessed 14 Mar. 2026.

‌

title: Machu Picchu: donde el pasado sigue vivo entre las montañas
author: Emilia Samalvides – Culture FII
excerpt: Entre montañas cubiertas de neblina y el silencio de los Andes, Machu Picchu aparece como un lugar casi mágico. A simple vista, puede parecer unas simples ruinas antiguas construidas hace muchos años, pero en...
body:
Entre montañas cubiertas de neblina y el silencio de los Andes, Machu Picchu aparece como un lugar casi mágico. A simple vista, puede parecer unas simples ruinas antiguas construidas hace muchos años, pero en realidad es mucho más que eso. Esta ciudad inca, construida en el siglo XV, sigue siendo importante hoy porque representa la historia, la cultura y la identidad del Perú.

Machu Picchu fue construido por los incas, una civilización muy avanzada para su época. Ubicada en lo alto de las montañas, la ciudad demuestra un increíble nivel de conocimiento en arquitectura e ingeniería. Sus estructuras han resistido el paso del tiempo, lo que muestra lo bien que fue construida. Según expertos de National Geographic Society, Machu Picchu es uno de los logros más impresionantes de la ingeniería del mundo antiguo.

La historia de Machu Picchu también la hace única. Está llena de secretos, misterios sin resolver y muchas preguntas que hasta hoy siguen abiertas. Muchas personas que visitan este lugar sienten que lo que están viendo no es completamente real, como si estuvieran dentro de un sueño. Ese sentimiento hace que la experiencia sea aún más especial.

Además, una de las cosas más impresionantes es cómo se construyó. Las piedras encajan perfectamente sin cemento, algo que incluso hoy en día parece difícil de lograr. La ciudad también está rodeada de naturaleza, como si formara parte de la montaña. Esto crea una conexión especial entre la obra humana y el entorno natural.

Hoy en día, Machu Picchu es uno de los destinos más visitados del mundo. Personas de diferentes países viajan para conocerlo y experimentar su belleza. Para el Perú, no es solo un lugar turístico, sino un símbolo de orgullo y de identidad cultural que representa su historia.

Machu Picchu no es solo un lugar bonito. Es una forma de conectar con el pasado y entender de dónde viene una cultura tan importante. Nos recuerda que, aunque el tiempo pase, hay cosas que nunca desaparecen.

Machu Picchu es un sueño. No hay una mejor forma de describirlo.

Bibliography:

National Geographic Society. Machu Picchu. National Geographic, https://www.nationalgeographic.com/travel/world-heritage/machu-picchu/

UNESCO World Heritage Centre. Historic Sanctuary of Machu Picchu. UNESCO, https://whc.unesco.org/en/list/274/

title: Oil in Crisis: How Global Conflicts Are Driving Prices and Economic Instability
author: Isabella Plascencia
excerpt: Currently, oil is one of the most valuable resources worldwide, thanks to its high energy density, ease of transportation, and versatility as a raw material, which improves and powers the majority of the...
body:
Currently, oil is one of the most valuable resources worldwide, thanks to its high energy density, ease of transportation, and versatility as a raw material, which improves and powers the majority of the world's transportation. Question yourself, what does your car need to work? How do you travel to another country? All these methods of transportation require oil to work. Recently, oil has increased its price due to geopolitical tensions and economic instability, causing an effect on the world.

Conflicts in oil producer regions have made markets fear supply disruptions. This means current tensions, such as the conflict involving Iran, Israel, and the United States, have created a moderate effect. Having on account that the Middle East is one of the largest oil-producing regions in the world, any military conflict there affects oil production. For example, the Strait of Hormuz is a critical location; it is the world's most important maritime “chokepoint”, with over 20% of global oil and liquefied natural gas consumption flowing through it daily. It connects Persian Gulf producers such as Saudi Arabia, Iran, the United Arab Emirates, Kuwait, and Iraq to international markets, particularly Asia.

As the conflict escalates, this route becomes unsafe for tankers. The problem here is that there are very few alternatives for bypassing this route. Because of this risk, traders in energy markets react quickly by increasing oil prices. Some consequences we will see would be a stagflationary shock, a rare and severe economic event combining high inflation, slowing growth, and rising unemployment, as well as a significant increase in global inflation, slowing economic growth, and higher production and logistics costs.

Beyond immediate economic effects, rising oil prices also impact everyday life for people around the world. Transportation costs increase, making goods more expensive since they rely on fuel for shipping and distribution. This can lead to higher prices for food, clothing, and basic necessities, affecting especially low- and middle-income households. Additionally, governments may struggle to maintain economic stability, as they face pressure to subsidize fuel or control inflation. In the long term, these challenges highlight the urgent need for alternative energy sources and more sustainable solutions, reducing global dependence on oil and making economies more resilient to geopolitical conflicts.

title: Rinocerontes blancos: Una vida que está desapareciendo
author: Emilia Salmavides
excerpt: En medio de grandes paisajes naturales, el Rinoceronte blanco vive como una de las especies más impresionantes del planeta. A simple vista, puede parecer sólo otro animal salvaje, pero en realidad es mucho más...
body:
En medio de grandes paisajes naturales, el Rinoceronte blanco vive como una de las especies más impresionantes del planeta. A simple vista, puede parecer sólo otro animal salvaje, pero en realidad es mucho más que eso. Hoy en día, su existencia está en peligro, y su historia refleja un problema mucho más grande: el impacto de los humanos en la naturaleza.

El rinoceronte blanco es uno de los animales terrestres más grandes del mundo y ha existido durante miles de años. Forma parte importante de su ecosistema y ayuda a mantener el equilibrio natural. Sin embargo, a pesar de su tamaño y fuerza, no ha podido protegerse de su mayor amenaza: los seres humanos.

La caza ilegal por sus cuernos ha reducido su población de forma alarmante. Muchas personas los cazan sin pensar en las consecuencias, poniendo en riesgo no solo a este animal, sino también a todo el entorno en el que vive. Según la World Wildlife Fund (WWF), esta sigue siendo la principal causa de su posible extinción.

La situación es aún más preocupante en el caso del rinoceronte blanco del norte, que está al borde de desaparecer. Esto no solo significa la pérdida de una especie, sino también la desaparición de una parte importante del equilibrio del planeta. Cuando un animal desaparece, el daño no es solo para ese momento, sino para el futuro.

Aun así, todavía hay esperanza. Existen organizaciones y personas que están trabajando para proteger a estos animales y evitar que desaparezcan. Sin embargo, este problema no se resolverá solo. Requiere que más personas tomen conciencia y entiendan lo que realmente está pasando.

Los rinocerontes blancos no deberían convertirse en solo una historia o una imagen en un libro. Su situación nos invita a reflexionar sobre nuestras acciones y el impacto que tienen en el mundo. Cuidar el medio ambiente no es solo una opción, es una responsabilidad.

Todavía estamos a tiempo de hacer la diferencia, pero ese tiempo no será para siempre.

Biblografía:

International Rhino Foundation. Rhino Conservation. https://rhinos.org

Save the Rhino International. About Rhinos. https://www.savetherhino.org

World Wildlife Fund. Rhino. https://www.worldwildlife.org/species/rhino

title: US Oil Blockade Increases Pressure on Cuba
author: Newston Staff
excerpt: Emilia Samalvides – Global Issues, Form II Oil may seem unimportant in some countries where it is always available. However, in Cuba, oil is essential for everyday life. It provides electricity, allows...
body:
Emilia Samalvides – Global Issues, Form II

Oil may seem unimportant in some countries where it is always available. However, in Cuba, oil is essential for everyday life. It provides electricity, allows transportation, and keeps the country moving. Without oil, daily life becomes much harder, almost as if everything begins to stop. Limiting access to oil is not just a political decision, but something that directly affects people and their opportunities.

The United States has increased restrictions on oil shipments to Cuba, making it more difficult for the country to receive fuel. These actions are part of long-standing tensions between the two nations. Because of this, Cuba is now facing serious fuel shortages that are affecting many parts of the country.

In addition, Cuba is currently going through a difficult situation. Without enough oil, the country cannot function properly or improve its conditions. Many people are experiencing power outages, limited transportation, and delays in basic services. These problems make everyday life more stressful and challenging for families.

These restrictions are connected to a long history of conflict between the United States and Cuba, especially since the Cold War. Economic sanctions have been used as a way to pressure the Cuban government. However, even though the goal is political, the effects are often felt by ordinary citizens.

According to BBC News, “energy shortages can seriously affect people’s daily lives.” This shows that the impact of these restrictions goes beyond politics and creates real difficulties for people. It is not just about fuel, but about how people live every day.

In conclusion, the restrictions on oil shipments to Cuba show how political decisions can affect entire populations. While these actions are meant to influence governments, the reality is that many people are the ones who face the consequences. This situation reminds us that global issues are not just about politics, but about real human lives.

Works cited

BBC News. Cuba fuel shortages worsen amid U.S. oil blockade. https://www.bbc.com

Reuters. Cuba runs on oil, and the oil is running out. https://www.reuters.com/world/us/russian-oil-only-delays-cubas-petroleum-problem-2026-04-08/

The Guardian. US energy blockade worsens crisis in Cuba. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2026/apr/06/cuba-blockade-energy-house-democrats

title: When Being An Afghan Girl Means Losing Your Education
author: Emilia Samalvides
excerpt: Imagine waking up one day and being told that you can never return to school simply because you are a girl. For millions of girls in Afghanistan, this is not imagination—it is reality. Since the Taliban...
body:
Imagine waking up one day and being told that you can never return to school simply because you are a girl. For millions of girls in Afghanistan, this is not imagination—it is reality. Since the Taliban returned to power in 2021, Afghan women and girls have been losing more and more rights each year. Yet, while the world looks away, the crisis continues to grow, and people keep suffering in silence.

Women in Afghanistan have lost most, if not nearly all, of their rights in recent years. Since the Taliban regained control, many restrictions have been placed on women’s lives, including limits on work, movement, and public participation. In many ways, respect for women has become almost absent from daily life. Some people are beginning to forget that women are human beings just like everyone else; the only difference is their gender. One of the most devastating consequences has been the loss of access to education, a right that Afghan women once valued deeply but that was suddenly taken away almost overnight.

Education is one of the most powerful tools for personal and national development. It is like a door: once opened, it reveals a world full of opportunities, challenges, and lessons that last a lifetime. However, girls in Afghanistan are no longer allowed to attend school beyond sixth grade. According to UNICEF, “education is a fundamental right for every child and essential for the future of any society.” More than one million Afghan girls have been denied secondary education since 2021. This restriction not only limits the future of millions of girls but also weakens the country’s ability to grow and remain stable.

Access to education is not just a privilege; it is a fundamental human right. When girls are allowed to learn, they gain opportunities to become what they have dreamed of all their lives: doctors, teachers, scientists, and leaders who can contribute to society and make a difference in this world full of injustice. Without access to education, millions of Afghan girls face a future with fewer opportunities and greater inequality. While the global conversation about Afghanistan may be fading, the harsh reality for these girls remains unchanged.

The doors of many classrooms in Afghanistan remain closed to girls, but the importance of education has not disappeared, it has only been forgotten. Around the world, organizations and individuals continue to advocate for the rights of Afghan women and girls. As the world moves on to other headlines, it is important not to forget those who are still waiting for the chance to learn.

Bibliography:

Amnesty International. Afghanistan: The Taliban’s War on Women. Amnesty International, https://www.amnesty.org.

Human Rights Watch. Afghanistan: Girls’ Education. Human Rights Watch, https://www.hrw.org.

Malala Fund. Girls’ Education in Afghanistan. Malala Fund, https://malala.org.

UNICEF. Girls’ Education in Afghanistan. UNICEF, https://www.unicef.org/afghanistan/education.

UN Women. Women’s Rights in Afghanistan. UN Women, https://www.unwomen.org.

title: A New Perspective in INSO Class
author: Micaela Alzamora
excerpt: This year, Newton College welcomes a new teacher to the INSO department: Thomas Andrew Sluhoski. Originally from Minnesota, United States, and raised in London, he brings a global perspective to his classes,...
body:
This year, Newton College welcomes a new teacher to the INSO department: Thomas Andrew Sluhoski. Originally from Minnesota, United States, and raised in London, he brings a global perspective to his classes, as now he teaches MYP INSO for Forms 1, 3, and 4. Unlike many teachers, teaching was not always his plan. While studying psychology, he realized the importance of having a trusted adult in young people’s lives. This, combined with his passion for understanding the world through travel, led him to education. As he explains, he aims to be “that supportive presence, always there for my students and always excited to share something new about the world.”

Before joining Newton, Mr. Sluhoski taught high school in Bangkok, Thailand, where he focused on sociology, as well as science and social studies. His international experience clearly influences his teaching style, encouraging students to think beyond their immediate environment. He believes INSO is valuable because it permits students to “connect their lived experiences of society to global issues,” helping them understand that they are part of something bigger.

So far, his impression of Newton students has been very positive, as he describes them as “lively and confident,” highlighting their willingness to share opinions and participate actively in class. This energy, according to him, creates a strong and engaging learning environment.

Outside the classroom, he is also embracing life in Peru. He is currently learning Spanish, exploring the country, and even taking salsa classes. He also shared a fun fact: he loves fishing, especially because it allows him to spend time in nature and enjoy the reward of cooking what he catches.

Looking ahead, his main goal for students is simple but meaningful: “Read and reflect.” He encourages students to grow their understanding of society and think about how they can contribute to improving it. His message to the Newton community reflects this idea: “Stay curious, don’t be afraid to make mistakes, and most importantly, do everything with empathy.”

Overall, Mr. Sluhoski’s arrival brings not only international experience but also a strong focus on curiosity, reflection, and empathy values that will likely shape the way students see the world both inside and outside the classroom.

title: Beyond the Grades: The IB Experience Through Students’ Eyes
author: Ivana Bozovich
excerpt: Form IV The International Baccalaureate is known for pushing students to think critically, work hard, and aim high. Everyone talks about how the IB program “prepares you for the future,” but few mention what...
body:
Form IV

The International Baccalaureate is known for pushing students to think critically, work hard, and aim high. Everyone talks about how the IB program “prepares you for the future,” but few mention what an IB student actually goes through to get there. To understand what that life is like, I sat down with Milan, a second year IB Diploma student, to understand more about how the program feels from the inside.

One of the first things I asked him was: How does a normal school day look? His answer was very open; he mentioned that the routine changes depending on how deep you are in the IB. For example, during his first year — Form V — the routine felt like any other school year, just a bit more challenging than MYP. However, when he graduated from upper school and decided to stay for a second year to complete the IB Diploma, things got tougher. Study times got longer and more demanding.

When he was in the last bit of IB and was studying for his final exams, he needed to balance his study time efficiently, not only for academic purposes but also to continue with his personal life. Because of the exams, he studied about 9 hours a day, dividing it into the morning, afternoon, and night.

Something he mentioned was the flow state: a mental state of being fully immersed and energized in an activity, often called being “in the zone.” He described it as something that has to be appreciated and taken advantage of when studying. The moments he has stayed up until two or three in the morning weren’t because he had a paper due or was struggling to study; those moments happened because he was in the “flow state” and took advantage of it, doing as much as he could while fully immersed in the task.

According to my Milan, teachers and fellow students support you by guiding you and helping with all the tasks. Having a good bond with your teacher is key if you want to have their support and mentorship during IB.

Lastly, my final question was, is the International Baccalaureate really worth it? He stated it depends. The IB opens doors to universities and opportunities around the world, but it also gives you an extra year to explore specific courses and think about what you want your future to look like. If you understand the weight of the IB and take advantage of the opportunity by putting in real effort, it’s definitely worth it. As a final note, I would like to share the meaningful feedback my brother gave me

Choose your courses wisely based on your interests, not on how hard they might be.

Dont be scared of what everyone says about the IB— if you stay organized and pay attention in class, everything will be alright.

title: Cross Country Is Back at Newton
author: Micaela Alzamora
excerpt: After a long time, one of Newton’s most anticipated interhouse events is finally coming back: cross country. This year, the Student Council has been working on new ideas to bring more energy into house...
body:
After a long time, one of Newton’s most anticipated interhouse events is finally coming back: cross country. This year, the Student Council has been working on new ideas to bring more energy into house activities, and the return of this event is already creating excitement across the school community.

Cross country is an interhouse competition where students and their families can represent their colours while completing a route of approximately 3.8 kilometers. The race begins on campus, continues outside the school through Pasaje El Marino, and includes a lap around the nearby lake before students re-enter the school, crossing the finish line on the track field where everyone is waiting. This makes the event not only physically challenging but also a unique experience that goes beyond a typical school activity.

One of the most exciting aspects of this year’s return is the participation of Form V students. For them, cross country is not only about competing, but also about celebrating their final year. Many seniors take part more festively, often running together, playing music, and even painting themselves, creating a more memorable atmosphere.

The return of cross country is especially meaningful this year because it has not taken place in recent years. Its comeback reflects a broader effort by the Student Council to revive interhouse activities and strengthen house spirit within the school. Although many interhouse events are still being planned, this marks an important step toward rebuilding traditions that bring the Newton community together.

Overall, the return of cross country represents more than just a race. It is a sign of renewed school spirit and student initiative. As more activities are expected to be introduced throughout the year, students are encouraged to stay engaged and look forward to what is coming next.

title: From First Impression to Future Lessons
author: Lara Pawelec
excerpt: This year, the mathematics department welcomes a new teacher, Carlos Torres, whose experience in mathematics education spans more than two decades. Having taught in schools and universities and worked as a...
body:
This year, the mathematics department welcomes a new teacher, Carlos Torres, whose experience in mathematics education spans more than two decades. Having taught in schools and universities and worked as a mathematics specialist at Peru’s Ministry of Education, Mr.Torres brings a deep passion for teaching and learning to the classroom. In a recent interview, he shared his first impressions of the school and what inspires his approach to teaching mathematics.

Background and passion for teaching mathematics

Mr. Carlos Torres studied mathematics at the National University of San Marcos and later completed a master’s degree in Mathematics Education at the Pontifical Catholic University of Peru (the PUCP), along with doctoral studies at the University of Barcelona. With over twenty years of teaching experience in both schools and universities, he has also contributed to research and international conferences on mathematics education. Despite this impressive background, his motivation remains simple. “I discovered my vocation for teaching when I was still a student at school,” he explains.

How does he approach teaching?

For Mr.Torres, teaching mathematics is about being able to help students see beyond their fears, as many are intimidated by the concept of maths, but he believes it can be used as an important way of developing logical and creative thinking. One of Mr.Torres's main goals is to encourage creativity in the classroom. He hopes students will “experience the pleasure of discovering new ideas” through engaging and enjoyable lessons, where jokes and comments are allowed, as long as learning is always prioritized.

Furthermore, Mr.Torres always seems to meet students' expectations, as he always delights them with his accompanying humor, making fun comments in the classroom while also focusing on the topic and being open to support any students and give step to step explanations, being open to supporting everyone to make sure the math is understood.

First impressions and advice

Since arriving at the school, Mr. Torres has already noticed several positive aspects of the Newton community. He describes the school as having “a very structured and well-articulated system” and says students are respectful and engaged in their learning while in his class. When it comes to succeeding in math, his advice is simple, do not fear mistakes. According to Mr.Torres, learning mathematics requires patience, curiosity, and the willingness to keep trying and improving. He's always open to allow students to participate in class, and if anyone is struggling or in doubt, he's always willing to precisely explain accommodations to each student's level to confirm they are able to fully understand what they are working on.

Looking ahead, Mr. Carlos Torres is excited to continue building connections with his students and the Newton community as a whole. He hopes to support them in developing their mathematical thinking throughout the year and in all different units. With his experience and enthusiasm, he is already becoming a valuable new member of the school community, especially for his new students.

title: Newton College: House Captains
author: Marco Hernandez Martinez
excerpt: With a new school year underway, the announcement of the House Captains has already started to build excitement across the school community. Representing Lancaster, Tudor, Windsor, and York, this year’s...
body:
With a new school year underway, the announcement of the House Captains has already started to build excitement across the school community. Representing Lancaster, Tudor, Windsor, and York, this year’s selected Form V students have stepped into one of the most visible student leadership roles, one that goes far beyond simply wearing a badge or title. House captains are expected to represent their houses during events, support their teammates, and help organize participation in school activities. As students look ahead to a busy year of house activities, the newly selected captains will play an important role in shaping the spirit, energy, and identity of their houses.

This year, Lancaster will be led by Antonia Barrios and Constantino Díaz. Both captains are expected to represent their house with responsibility and dedication throughout the year. Their leadership will be important in maintaining house pride and encouraging students to contribute to both competitive and community-based activities.

In Tudor, the new captains are Bianca Patroni and Adriano Zolezzi. Their role will involve not only representing Tudor during events but also setting an example through commitment and teamwork. Strong leadership can often make the difference during house competitions, and Tudor will be looking to its captains to help maintain strong participation during interhouse.

Meanwhile, Windsor, the reigning champion, has appointed Adriana Perea and Sebastián Virreira as its captains for the year. As leaders of the current champion house, they will be responsible for helping maintain Windsor’s strong presence in school activities and house competitions. Their contribution will likely shape Windsor’s presence throughout the year, both in competition and in house spirit.

For York, the position of House Captain has gone to Blanca Figueros and Rodrigo Bardales. Their appointment marks the start of what York students hope is a successful and united year. In a role that requires responsibility, communication, and example, both captains will be expected to lead with confidence and inspire their house to perform at its best.

Although each house will compete against the others, the appointment of House Captains also reflects something shared by the entire school: the importance of student leadership. These positions are not only about winning events, but also about representing the school values such as respect, empathy, commitment, and integrity. As the school year continues, students will be watching closely to see how each pair of captains leads its house forward.

The selection of this year’s House Captains marks an important beginning for Lancaster, Tudor, Windsor, and York. With their houses depending on them for encouragement and guidance, these students now have the chance to make a lasting impact on school life. Whether through competition, participation, or house spirit, their leadership will help define the year ahead.

title: Study smarter, not harder
author: Marco Hernandez
excerpt: Learn how to ace your tests 1. Active Recall: Train Your Brain Like a Muscle Active recall is one of the most effective study techniques. It forces your brain to retrieve information instead of simply...
body:
Learn how to ace your tests

1. Active Recall: Train Your Brain Like a Muscle

Active recall is one of the most effective study techniques. It forces your brain to retrieve information instead of simply recognizing it. Many students reread notes or highlight textbooks, but this actually creates a false sense of understanding. You might feel familiar with the material, but you may not actually remember it during a test.

With active recall, you close your book and try to remember the information on your own. For example, after studying a topic, you can write down everything you remember, answer practice questions, or quiz yourself using flashcards. This process strengthens neural connections in your brain, making it easier to access that information later.

Over time, this method not only improves memory but also builds confidence, because you are practicing the exact skill you need during exams: recalling information without help.

2. The Pomodoro Technique: Master Focus and Avoid Burnout

One of the biggest challenges students face is staying focused for long periods. The Pomodoro Technique solves this by breaking study time into short, manageable intervals. Typically, you study for 25 minutes and then take a 5-minute break. After completing four cycles, you take a longer break of 15–30 minutes.

This method works because it matches how your brain naturally focuses. Instead of forcing yourself to concentrate for hours, you work in short bursts of high productivity. Knowing that a break is coming soon also keeps you motivated and reduces procrastination.

Additionally, regular breaks prevent mental fatigue, which means you can maintain a high level of performance throughout your study session. Over time, this leads to more efficient learning and less stress.

3. Spaced Repetition: Beat Forgetting Over Time

Cramming the night before an exam might help you pass, but you will likely forget the information quickly. Spaced repetition is a technique that involves reviewing material over increasing intervals of time—such as after one day, three days, one week, and so on.

This method is based on the “forgetting curve,” which shows that we forget information rapidly unless we revisit it. Each time you review the material, your brain strengthens the memory and slows down the forgetting process.

For example, instead of studying a topic once for two hours, you could study it for shorter periods across multiple days. This not only improves long-term retention but also makes studying feel less overwhelming.

Spaced repetition is especially useful for subjects that require memorization, such as vocabulary, formulas, or historical facts.

Final Thoughts

Studying smarter doesn’t mean using dozens of complicated techniques. In fact, mastering just a few strategies—like active recall, the Pomodoro Technique, and spaced repetition—can completely transform your academic performance. By using these methods consistently, students can learn more effectively, reduce stress, and achieve better results.

MLA 9 Bibliography

Dunlosky, John, et al. “Improving Students’ Learning with Effective Learning Techniques.” Psychological Science in the Public Interest, vol. 14, no. 1, 2013, pp. 4–58.

Medina, John. Brain Rules: 12 Principles for Surviving and Thriving at Work, Home, and School. Pear Press, 2014.

Oakley, Barbara. A Mind for Numbers: How to Excel at Math and Science. TarcherPerigee, 2014.

Purdue University. “MLA Formatting and Style Guide.” Purdue OWL, owl.purdue.edu/owl/research_and_citation/mla_style/mla_formatting_and_style_guide.html

Roediger, Henry L., and Mark A. McDaniel. Make It Stick: The Science of Successful Learning. Harvard University Press, 2014.

title: Where Voices Turn Into Actions
author: Lara Pawelec
excerpt: Students' voice in action This week, students from 6th grade to Form V took an important step in shaping the school community through the Year Representative application process. Year Representatives play a...
body:
Students' voice in action

This week, students from 6th grade to Form V took an important step in shaping the school community through the Year Representative application process. Year Representatives play a key role within the student council, acting as a bridge between students and school leadership. As part of different committees, they work together to propose ideas and improvements that benefit the entire school community.

Inside the elections: What happened this week?

This year’s process was organized through an open Google Form, allowing all students to apply freely. Applicants were asked to select a first and second choice committee, with options from this year's SCEB, including Spirit, Community, and Student Affairs. The application also included a series of reflective questions that required honesty and personal insight. “Why would you like to apply to be a year representative?” “What makes you a strong candidate to represent your grade?” and “What are some of your ideas/proposals?” were some of the questions asked in the Google Form. The focus was not on popularity, but on genuine intention and commitment to leadership. Continuously, in week 4, on Monday, March 23rd, we will have the final round of elections, voting for each grade to choose their 3 candidates. From 7:50-8:00 am in each tutor period, students will be allowed to vote and decide on their final reps.

What Students Want: Priorities Across Grades

Across all grades, students shared common goals for improving the school experience. Many applicants highlighted the importance of better events and stronger engagement within the school community. At the same time, each grade brought different perspectives and proposals depending on their interests and chosen committees. Notably, this is the first year that 6th-grade students are included in the process, adding new and younger voices eager to contribute and learn.

More Than Just Elections: Building Leadership

Beyond the outcome, the application process itself plays an important role in developing leadership skills. Applying requires effort, reflection, and the ability to clearly express ideas and motivations. It encourages students to build confidence, take responsibility, and step outside their comfort zones. Even for those who may not be selected, the experience remains valuable and meaningful.

From Applications to Opportunity

Ultimately, this process goes beyond simply selecting grade representatives. It allows students to express their opinions while developing leadership and teamwork skills and progressively strengthening them. By encouraging participation from all grades, the Year Representative system continues to strengthen the school community and create opportunities for students to grow. So, even if it's too late already this year, what stops you in the next? Be encouraged to apply and have a chance to demonstrate your abilities, and combine them with communication and leadership to make Newton a better place.

Sources:

1. Image: “Leadership vs. Teamwork.” Bucks & Berks Recruitment, 8 July 2022, www.bucksandberks.co.uk/leadership-vs-teamwork/

. Accessed 22 Mar. 2026.

2.Year rep application Google Forms and information from the SCEB.

title: Bam Adebayo's 83 point game - Samuel Yepez
author: Samuel Yepez
excerpt: Bam the Great, or Bam the Fake? On Tuesday, the 10th of March, Miami Heat all-star Bam Adebayo scored a record-breaking 83 points against the Washington Wizards. This was a record-breaking performance that...
body:
Bam the Great, or Bam the Fake?

On Tuesday, the 10th of March, Miami Heat all-star Bam Adebayo scored a record-breaking 83 points

against the Washington Wizards. This was a record-breaking performance that surpassed the late Kobe

Bryant´s 81-point game. For many, this was an exciting and incredible performance and

well-deserved, but Bam, the coaching staff, and the opposing team are also receiving a lot of heat for

his performance.

Fans and sports bloggers on social media platforms labeled it "unethical stat-padding" due to the 43

free-throw attempts and the game being a blowout. Critics do not respect the amount of free throws

Bam attempted and claimed that the Heat were intentionally missing free throws, and then fouling to

get the ball back to Bam and get more points, calling this stat-padding. Ex NBA players like Charles

Barkley do not agree with Bam Adebayo’s 83-point game. They think that scoring 83 is a complete

and utter disrespect to Kobe Bryant. Chris Russo from ESPN also said that the Miami Heat's pursuit

of the record was a "complete disgrace" to the game. Bam’s averaged 17 points per game before this

game, suggesting that he is not consistently a player to get this amount of points, and the Miami Heat

played deliberately just to get him to break the record, not respecting the way the game is usually

played, calling out attention that Bam should not hold a record over Kobe, who perhaps is considered

a more all-time great player.

There are a lot of NBA players and coaches who disagree with the sports commentators and fans.

Players like Draymond Green, from the Golden State Warriors, said that it is actually really difficult to

get that amount of points, especially after getting 30 in the first quarter, and people should stop acting

like he’s cheating. In his opinion, Bam earned those baskets fairly. Giannis Antetokounmpo said, “In

30 years, nobody's going to remember how many free throws he shot,” emphasizing that it doesn’t

matter what type of baskets he got, just that he got them, and that is all that matters when it comes to

record-breaking. Bam’s coach from the Miami Heat, Erik Spoelstra, said, “I apologize to absolutely

no one. Period.”

The debate about Bam’s record amount of points is still being debated by a number of people. Some

think his achievement was completely unfair and disrespectful, while others think it was legitimately

earned. So, now it's your turn to decide, is Bam the great, or is Bam the fake?

title: Breaking News for the Formula 1 Community!
author: Leonardo Tello
excerpt: In March 2026, Formula One made the important decision to cancel both the Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grands Prix, which were originally scheduled for April. These races were meant to take place at the Bahrain...
body:
In March 2026, Formula One made the important decision to cancel both the Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grands Prix, which were originally scheduled for April. These races were meant to take place at the Bahrain International Circuit and the Jeddah Corniche Circuit as the fourth and fifth rounds of the season. However, due to increasing geopolitical conflicts in the Middle East, the sport prioritized safety over competition.

The main reason for the cancellations was the emergence of a significant regional conflict involving Iran and other global powers. This situation created serious security risks in several Gulf countries, including Bahrain and Saudi Arabia. The proximity of military activity and the targeting of key infrastructure in the region led Formula One, in collaboration with the Fédération Internationale de l'Automobile (FIA), to determine that it would be unsafe to proceed with the events.

Formula One released a statement confirming that, after careful consideration, the races would not occur as planned. This decision was made jointly with governing bodies and local promoters, emphasizing the importance of protecting drivers, teams, staff, and, most importantly, fans. The cancellation also affected support series such as Formula 2, Formula 3, and F1 Academy, all of which were scheduled to race during the same weekends.

Another key factor contributing to the cancellations was logistics. Since the Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grand Prix are early in the Formula One calendar, there was limited time to organize replacement races. Although alternative venues were considered, no suitable substitutes could be arranged on short notice. As a result, the 2026 season calendar was reduced from 24 to 22 races, creating a break from F1 for several weeks.

These cancellations highlight how global events can directly impact international sports. Formula One has faced similar disruptions in the past, including cancellations due to political unrest and the COVID-19 pandemic. In this instance, the situation underscores the sport’s reliance on global stability and the challenges of maintaining a worldwide racing calendar during times of geopolitical uncertainty.

After the recent cancellation of Formula 1 events in the Middle East, F1 fans now wonder what will happen to the most important and most anticipated race on the F1 calendar, the Abu Dhabi Grand Prix.

References:

Richards, Giles. “F1 Cancels Bahrain and Saudi Arabia GPs because of Middle East War.” The Guardian, The Guardian, 14 Mar. 2026, www.theguardian.com/sport/2026/mar/14/formula-one-cancel-bahrain-saudi-arabia-grand-prix-war-middle-east?utm_source=chatgpt.com. Accessed 23 Mar. 2026.

GODonnell@dolphins.com. “F1 Scraps Bahrain, Saudi Arabia Races.” Formula 1 Crypto.com Miami Grand Prix, 19 Mar. 2026, f1miamigp.com/news/press-release/f1-calls-off-bahrain-and-saudi-arabian-races/?srsltid=AfmBOop6t6jklbGpfVHRwLaeiIMyDNBLCq4KxTRs9Nl42hi3GgIpdSys&utm_source=chatgpt.com. Accessed 23 Mar. 2026.

Reis, Bruna. “Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grands Prix Cancelled as F1 Chiefs Issue Statement.” Express.co.uk, 14 Mar. 2026, www.express.co.uk/sport/f1-autosport/2182327/f1-decision-bahrain-saudi-grand-prix. Accessed 23 Mar. 2026.

title: El Six Nations de rugby llega a una conclusión.
author: Jaime Santiago Carbajal
excerpt: El Six Nations Championship 2026 dejó una de las ediciones más emocionantes de los últimos años. A lo largo del torneo, los seis equipos participantes mostraron un alto nivel de juego, con partidos intensos,...
body:
El Six Nations Championship 2026 dejó una de las ediciones más emocionantes de los últimos años. A lo largo del torneo, los seis equipos participantes mostraron un alto nivel de juego, con partidos intensos, muchos puntos y resultados impredecibles que mantuvieron el interés hasta el final.

El campeonato se decidió en la última jornada, cuando Francia logró consagrarse campeón tras vencer a Inglaterra en un partido muy reñido. El encuentro fue uno de los más espectaculares del torneo, con constantes cambios en el marcador y una definición en los últimos segundos gracias a una patada decisiva. Este final dramático convirtió la victoria francesa en un momento inolvidable para los aficionados.

Por otro lado, Irlanda tuvo una destacada participación y terminó en segundo lugar. A pesar de ganar su último partido, no logró alcanzar a Francia en la tabla general. Equipos como Escocia e Inglaterra también mostraron un buen nivel, contribuyendo a que el torneo fuera muy competitivo.

Uno de los aspectos más llamativos de esta edición fue la gran cantidad de puntos anotados. A diferencia de otros años, los equipos apostaron por un juego más ofensivo, lo que resultó en más tries y partidos más dinámicos. Además, varios jugadores destacaron por su rendimiento individual, siendo claves en los resultados de sus selecciones.

En conclusión, el Six Nations 2026 fue un torneo lleno de emoción, intensidad y espectáculo. Su final ajustado y el alto nivel de juego lo convierten en una edición memorable dentro de la historia del rugby europeo.

title: High Expectations for Spain in the 2026 World Cup!
author: Leonardo Tello
excerpt: With the 2026 FIFA World Cup approaching in North America, expectations are high for the Spain national football team. After a recent victory in the “Eurocopa” and a rising generation of talented players, many...
body:
With the 2026 FIFA World Cup approaching in North America, expectations are high for the Spain national football team. After a recent victory in the “Eurocopa” and a rising generation of talented players, many fans and analysts believe Spain could lift football’s most prestigious trophy for the second time in its history.

Spain’s confidence going into the tournament comes from its strong squad and recent performances. The team has key players such as Rodri and Pedri, who help control the rhythm of the game and keep possession of the ball. Their style of play is often linked to the famous tiki-taka approach, which focuses on short passes, movement, and patience in attack.

Another reason for the optimism is the rise of young players like Lamine Yamal and Nico Williams, whose speed and creativity bring energy to Spain’s attack. Under head coach Luis de la Fuente, Spain is likely to play in a 4-3-3 formation that allows the team to control possession while attacking from both wings. Analysts have also highlighted Spain’s potential on the international stage. “Spain has the talent and depth to compete with any team in the world,” said analyst Robbie Dunne from Opta Sports. “If the young players continue to improve, this squad has a real chance of winning the World Cup.”

However, high expectations also bring pressure. Spain has struggled in recent World Cups despite entering tournaments as one of the favorites, and the team has not reached the quarterfinals since winning the 2010 FIFA World Cup. Some experts believe Spain still needs a more consistent goal-scoring striker to compete against the world’s strongest defenses, although players like Ferran Torres have recently been used in that role.

As the 2026 tournament gets closer, excitement around Spain’s national team continues to grow. With a talented squad, a clear playing style, and several promising young stars, expectations are higher than ever. Whether Spain can turn that promise into another historic World Cup victory will be decided on football’s biggest stage in 2026.

Sources

Gualtieri, Thomas, et al. “‘Football Is Seldom Ever Just about Sports’—This Year’s European Championship Demonstrated How Waves of Immigration Have Redefined Sports.” Fortune Europe, Fortune, 15 July 2024, fortune.com/europe/2024/07/15/this-years-european-championship-demonstrated-how-waves-of-immigration-have-redefined-sports-spain-england/.

title: Marruecos stole the cup from Senegal
author: Samuel Yepez
excerpt: Achraf Hakimi (Left) & Sadio Mané (Right) with the AFCON trophy (Middle) During the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations Final between Senegal and Morocco, the game became very controversial near the end. First, Senegal...
body:
Achraf Hakimi (Left) & Sadio Mané (Right) with the AFCON trophy (Middle)

During the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations Final between Senegal and Morocco, the game

became very controversial near the end. First, Senegal scored a goal, but the referee

disallowed it , and many players felt it was unfair because he did not clearly check VAR

before making the decision. Right after that, the referee gave Morocco a penalty, which

made Senegal even more upset. Morocco took the penalty but missed it, so the score stayed

0–0. As a result, Senegal’s players were very angry about both decisions, so they stopped

playing and walked off the field for several minutes to protest. After they returned, the match

continued, went to extra time, and Senegal scored the only goal to win 1–0 on the field.

However, in the following months, the CAF reviewed what happened during the game,

especially the players leaving. After investigating, in March 2026, CAF decided that leaving

the pitch was against the rules. Because of this, they cancelled Senegal’s win and gave

Morocco a 3–0 victory, making the Morocco team the official champions. Since then there

has been a fury on social media, with fans feeling upset. As stated by the buisnessday

article, “My mum told me to reject the AFCON trophy. I’m officially rejecting it and hope my

teammates do the same. We had a chance but failed to win,” Hakimi said, while

acknowledging Senegal as deserving champions. “That’s football; sometimes you win and

lose. Senegal beat us fairly and deserved it. It will be unfair to ruin their joy after the hard

work,” he added. Hakimi reiterated his respect for CAF’s decision but maintained his

personal stance. “I respect the decision, but I’m officially rejecting the trophy. I didn’t win the

2025 AFCON. Congratulations to Senegal once again. (Nlebem 1)”.

By: Samuel Yepez

Bibliography:

Nlebem, Anthony. “Hakimi Rejects AFCON Title, Backs Senegal as True Winners -

Businessday NG.” Businessday NG, 21 Mar. 2026,

businessday.ng/sports/article/hakimi-rejects-afcon-title-backs-senegal-as-true-

winners/. Accessed 22 Mar. 2026.

Stevens, Rob. “Afcon 2025: Senegal Stand in Way of Morocco’s 50-Year Wait for

Glory.” BBC Sport, 16 Jan. 2026,

www.bbc.com/sport/football/articles/cevn22grxgzo.
